## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      8 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 5, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _James Anderson_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "Android device list syncing is so so broken since the last release or two. Such a shame, used to be a decent app."
            2. _Medewerker Bedrijf_, May 21, 2026, 2/5: "As every Microsoft product, it spams you with popups whenever you do not wish to use the settings they want you to. Disabling notifications makes it near unusable, starting up behind two popups telling me to enable them. Stop this horrible behaviour. Other than that, it should be simple and I suppose it is, so it would be 5 stars if it did not interupt me all the time."
            3. _Себастьян II_, May 5, 2026, 2/5: "For several months the bug widget Before it was great to have your todo list on the first page of my Samsung Android phone. But for some time now, the widget has started blinking at high speed and is unusable. I hope Microsoft will find a solution."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _h cruiser_, Jul 19, 2026, 3/5: "Would be good to have more features. At least: 1. Improve deletion of scheduled completed items. 2. Add text formatting. 3. Add integration with OneNote as a free feature."
